component.name: LoadChannelsTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
sub run() print "DEBUG: LoadChannelsTask run"
m.top.responseJson = "" m.top.errorMessage = ""
payload = { setupType: m.top.setupType host: m.top.host username: m.top.username password: m.top.password m3uUrl: m.top.m3uUrl epgUrl: m.top.epgUrl forceRefresh: m.top.forceRefresh offset: m.top.offset limit: m.top.limit nickname: "ForceRefreshFix" }
body = FormatJson(payload)
transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") port = CreateObject("roMessagePort") transfer.SetMessagePort(port) transfer.SetUrl(m.top.apiBase + "/api/channels-lite") transfer.SetRequest("POST") transfer.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
ok = transfer.AsyncPostFromString(body) if ok = false then m.top.errorMessage = "Failed to start channels request." return end if
msg = wait(180000, port) if msg = invalid then m.top.errorMessage = "Timeout loading channels." return end if
if type(msg) <> "roUrlEvent" then m.top.errorMessage = "Unexpected message type: " + type(msg) return end if
code = msg.GetResponseCode() print "DEBUG: LoadChannelsTask response code = "; code
if code <> 200 then m.top.errorMessage = "Channels request failed: " + code.ToStr() return end if
response = msg.GetString() print "DEBUG: LoadChannelsTask response body len = "; Len(response)
if response = invalid or response = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "No channels returned." return end if
m.top.responseJson = response end sub
